coach.subtitle: Ek goal choose karo — main aapke liye 12-step science plan banaungi.

ai.welcome_msg: Hi! Main Amy hoon 💜 aapki AI parenting coach. Neend, tantrums, picky eating, school worries — kuch bhi poocho. Main yahan hoon.

landing.hero_headline: Jahan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
landing.hero_sub: Apne bachche ke liye step-by-step, science-backed parenting plans pao — aapke AI Parenting Coach se.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Shuru karna free hai · Credit card ki zarurat nahi
landing.problems_sub: Har parent face karta hai. Amy Coach aapko solve karne mein madad karti hai — ek personalized step at a time.
landing.not_alone: Aap akele nahi hain — aur aapko yeh khud nahi samajhna hai.
landing.features_heading: Smart Parenting ke liye Sab Kuch
landing.features_sub: Ek platform. Aapke bachche ke liye kaafi powerful tools.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Real Parenting Challenges Solve Karo
landing.coach_desc: Tantrums se screen tak, neend se focus tak — Amy Coach aapko deep, personalized step-by-step plans deti hai jo actually kaam karti hain.
landing.highlight_1: Aapke bachche ke liye personalized plan
landing.feature_routine_desc: Structured, personalized routines banao jo aapke bachche ko strong habits banane mein madad karein.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Activities, insights aur parenting guidance ek jagah.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Kuch bhi poocho aur jab zarurat ho tab turant parenting advice pao.
landing.mid_cta: Amy Coach se shuru karo aur aage badhte raho.
landing.how_sub: Pehle personalized parenting plan ke liye teen simple steps.
landing.step1_desc: Woh parenting challenge choose karo jise aap solve karna chahte ho — tantrums se neend tak.
landing.step2_desc: Amy ko apne bachche ki umar, personality aur current habits ke baare mein batao.
landing.step3_desc: Ek personalized, science-backed plan pao jise aap aaj se shuru kar sakte ho.
landing.trust_heading: Child Psychology & Behavioral Science par Based
landing.trust_sub: Har plan proven research par based hai — generic advice nahi. Framework par trust karo, steps follow karo.
landing.trust1_desc: Proven principles par based jaise bachche lasting habits banate hain.
landing.trust2_desc: Top child psychologists ki evidence-based strategies.
landing.trust3_desc: Duniya bhar ke experts ke practical parenting frameworks.
landing.final_cta_heading: Apni parenting journey shuru karne ke liye taiyar ho?
landing.final_cta_sub: AmyNest AI se judo aur minutes mein personalized parenting plan pao — bilkul free.
landing.footer_tagline: Jahan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
